born.title: Born in Kobe, Japan
born.content: I was born and raised in Kobe City, Hyogo Prefecture, Japan.

highSchool.title: Graduated from Nagata High School
highSchool.content: I was graduated from Nagata high school in Hyogo.

university.title: University student
university.content: I am an Kwansei Gakuin University student from April 2020.
